critical.mandate: Every change request must be documented with a CR ID before any work begins
Classification determines the path — do not skip classification

step.title: Capture Change Request
step.ask: Describe the change request: What needs to change and why?
Is this driven by: user feedback, stakeholder request, technical discovery, or market shift?

step.title: Load Current State
step.action: Read {planning_artifacts}/prd.md — scan section headers and feature list
Read {planning_artifacts}/architecture.md — scan component list and tech stack

step.title: Classify Impact
step.action: 1. SCOPE: How many files affected? <5 = small, 5-15 = medium, >15 = large
- PRD only (new requirement, no arch change) → PRD-ONLY
- PRD + Architecture (new component, API change, tech decision) → PRD+ARCH
3. SPRINT IMPACT: Current sprint can absorb, or needs next sprint?
Present classification to user for confirmation

step.title: Route Decision
step.action: Get user confirmation on the recommended path.

step.title: Generate Change Request Record
step.template-output: Generate change request document with: CR ID, date, source, description, classification (QUICK/PRD-ONLY/PRD+ARCH/FULL), artifact impact, sprint impact, recommended execution path (ordered /gaia commands), status: OPEN.

step.title: Next Steps
step.action: Present the recommended command sequence to the user
